channel.title: environment on Oshean Lee Garonita | Mapper | Environmental Planner
channel.description: Recent content in environment on Oshean Lee Garonita | Mapper | Environmental Planner

item.title: On Physical Framework and Land Use Plans: Let's Bridge the Gap!
item.description: First Entry Plans are powerful We make plans for things that we want to achieve. It could be listing down our to-do list for the day, or writing grocery list, or even just a simple reminder could be a plan. Plans give us a sense of purpose as to what we want to do in the future. But let us try scaling it up. Have you ever wondered how our houses were made?

item.title: On Physical Framework and Land Use Plans: Let's Bridge the Gap!
item.description: First Entry Plans are powerful We make plans for things that we want to achieve. It could be listing down our to-do list for the day, or writing grocery list, or even just a simple reminder could be a plan. Plans give us a sense of purpose as to what we want to do in the future. But let us try scaling it up. Have you ever wondered how our houses were made?
